subject: Chemistry
objective: Observe combination reaction
keyObservation: Dazzling white flame, white powder formed.

subject: Chemistry
experimentName: Reaction of Lead Nitrate and KI
objective: Observe double displacement
keyObservation: Yellow precipitate of Lead Iodide formed.

subject: Chemistry
experimentName: Action of Zinc on Dilute Sulphuric Acid
objective: Observe displacement and gas evolution
keyObservation: Evolution of H2 gas with bubbles, flask becomes hot.

subject: Chemistry
objective: Observe thermal decomposition
keyObservation: Green color changes to brown; pungent smell of SO2/SO3.

subject: Chemistry
objective: Observe decomposition by electricity
keyObservation: Volume of H2 is double that of O2.

subject: Chemistry
objective: Test for Hydrogen gas
keyObservation: Gas burns with a pop sound (Hydrogen).
commonMistakes: Not using soap solution for bubbles

subject: Chemistry
objective: Test for CO2 gas
commonMistakes: Passing gas for too long (turns clear)

subject: Chemistry
objective: Check for ions
keyObservation: Bulb glows only for HCl and NaOH.

subject: Chemistry
objective: Observe reactivity
keyObservation: Sodium reacts violently, Magnesium reacts with hot water.

subject: Chemistry
objective: Preparation of Ester
keyObservation: Sweet fruity smell of ester is produced.

subject: Physics
objective: Verify V = IR
keyObservation: Graph of V vs I is a straight line.

subject: Physics
objective: Verify Rs = R1 + R2

subject: Physics
objective: Verify 1/Rp = 1/R1 + 1/R2

subject: Physics
objective: Determine focus
keyObservation: Distant object image is at F.

subject: Physics
objective: Trace light path

subject: Biology
objective: Demonstrate light necessity

subject: Biology
objective: Demonstrate CO2 necessity
keyObservation: Plant with KOH shows no starch.

subject: Biology
objective: Digestive action
keyObservation: Iodine color disappears where saliva is added.

subject: Physics
objective: Verify buoyancy
keyObservation: Weight loss = Weight of water displaced.

subject: Physics
objective: Verify laws of reflection

objective: Distinguish mixtures

subject: Chemistry
objective: Separate pigments
keyObservation: Different colors rise to different heights.
